description: Understanding the organization and its context

clause_name: Understanding the organization and its context
description: Determining external and internal issues that are relevant to its purpose

clause_name: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
description: Determining the interested parties that are relevant to the AI management system

clause_name: Determining the scope of the AI management system
description: Determining the boundaries and applicability of the AI management system to establish its scope
Establishing, implementing, maintaining and continually improving an AI management system
Leadership and commitment
Top management demonstrating leadership and commitment with respect to the AI management system
Top management establishing an AI policy
Assigning the responsibility and authority for relevant roles
Actions to address risks and opportunities

clause_name: Actions to address risks and opportunities
description: Determining the risks and opportunities that need to be addressed
Establishing and maintaining AI risk criteria
Defining and establishing an AI risk assessment process
Defining an AI risk treatment process to select appropriate AI risk treatment options
Assessing the potential consequences for individuals or groups of individuals, or both, and societies

clause_name: AI objectives and planning to achieve them
description: Establishing AI objectives at relevant functions and levels
Carrying out changes to the AI management system in a planned manner
Resources and competence
Determining and providing the resources needed for the establishment, implementation, maintenance and continual improvement
Determining the necessary competence of person(s) doing work under its control
Ensuring persons doing work under the organization's control are aware of the AI policy
Determining the internal and external communications relevant to the AI management system
Managing documented information required by the AI management system
Operational planning and control
Planning, implementing and controlling the processes needed to meet requirements
Performing AI risk assessments in accordance with 6.1.2 at planned intervals
Implementing the AI risk treatment plan according to 6.1.3 and verifying its effectiveness
Performing AI system impact assessments according to 6.1.4 at planned intervals
Monitoring, measurement, analysis and evaluation
Determining what needs to be monitored and measured
Conducting internal audits at planned intervals
Top management reviewing the organization's AI management system at planned intervals
Continual improvement
Continually improving the suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of the AI management system
Reacting to nonconformity and taking action to control and correct it
